content.text: I have a clear picture now. Let me write the plan.

input.content:
# Remove chainId parameter from /skills/generate

## Context
Base Mainnet (chainId 8453) should always be implied. Remove `chainId` from the API request body and hardcode it throughout the pipeline.

## Changes

### 1. `src/routes/skills.js`
- Remove `chainId` from destructured request body (line 61)
- Update validation to only require `contractAddress` (line 63-64)
- Pass hardcoded `8453` to `createPlaceholder` and `runPipeline` (lines 70, 72)

### 2. `src/pipeline/index.js`
- Remove `chainId` parameter from `runPipeline`, hardcode `8453` when calling `runResearch` (line 16, 23)

### 3. `src/pipeline/research.js`
- Remove `chainId` parameter from `runResearch`, hardcode `8453` in prompt and return value (line 17, 21, 35)

### 4. `src/tools/research.js`
- Remove `chainId` from tool parameter schemas and `execute` calls — hardcode `8453` (lines 11-14, 22-25)

### 5. `src/tools/explorer.js`
- Remove `chainId` parameter from `fetchABI` and `fetchSourceCode` — hardcode `8453` internally (lines 12-13, 28-29)
- Remove `getExplorerUrl(chainId)` helper, just use the Base Mainnet URL directly
- Remove Base Sepolia from `EXPLORER_URLS` map (or remove the map entirely)

### 6. `src/storage.js`
- Remove `chainId` from placeholder metadata (line 53)

### 7. Update tests
- `src/routes/skills.test.js` — remove chainId from request bodies/assertions
- `src/pipeline/pipeline.test.js` — remove chainId from research mock and skill content
- `src/pipeline/validate.test.js` — keep chainId in VALID_SKILL frontmatter (it's still in generated output), but remove the "fails when chainId missing" test if we no longer validate it... actually chainId should still appear in generated skills as metadata, so keep validation
- `src/tools/explorer.test.js` — remove sepolia/unsupported chainId tests, update calls to not pass chainId

### 8. Prompt files (no code changes needed)
- `src/pipeline/prompts/research-system.md` — chainId stays in research output schema (it's always 8453)
- `src/pipeline/prompts/generate-system.md` — chainId stays in skill frontmatter spec

## Verification
- Run `npx vitest` to ensure all tests pass
- Verify the generate endpoint works with just `{ "contractAddress": "0x..." }` body

content.content: File created successfully at: /home/denis/.claude/plans/luminous-wibbling-naur.md

# Remove chainId parameter from /skills/generate

## Context
Base Mainnet (chainId 8453) should always be implied. Remove `chainId` from the API request body and hardcode it throughout the pipeline.

## Changes

### 1. `src/routes/skills.js`
- Remove `chainId` from destructured request body (line 61)
- Update validation to only require `contractAddress` (line 63-64)
- Pass hardcoded `8453` to `createPlaceholder` and `runPipeline` (lines 70, 72)

### 2. `src/pipeline/index.js`
- Remove `chainId` parameter from `runPipeline`, hardcode `8453` when calling `runResearch` (line 16, 23)

### 3. `src/pipeline/research.js`
- Remove `chainId` parameter from `runResearch`, hardcode `8453` in prompt and return value (line 17, 21, 35)

### 4. `src/tools/research.js`
- Remove `chainId` from tool parameter schemas and `execute` calls — hardcode `8453` (lines 11-14, 22-25)

### 5. `src/tools/explorer.js`
- Remove `chainId` parameter from `fetchABI` and `fetchSourceCode` — hardcode `8453` internally (lines 12-13, 28-29)
- Remove `getExplorerUrl(chainId)` helper, just use the Base Mainnet URL directly
- Remove Base Sepolia from `EXPLORER_URLS` map (or remove the map entirely)

### 6. `src/storage.js`
- Remove `chainId` from placeholder metadata (line 53)

### 7. Update tests
- `src/routes/skills.test.js` — remove chainId from request bodies/assertions
- `src/pipeline/pipeline.test.js` — remove chainId from research mock and skill content
- `src/pipeline/validate.test.js` — keep chainId in VALID_SKILL frontmatter (it's still in generated output), but remove the "fails when chainId missing" test if we no longer validate it... actually chainId should still appear in generated skills as metadata, so keep validation

content.text: All changes done. Let me verify there are no remaining `chainId` references in the source (non-test, non-prompt) files that were missed:

All remaining `chainId` occurrences are appropriate — they're either hardcoded `8453` values or validation/test code for the generated SKILL.md frontmatter (which still requires `chainId` as part of the spec). No consumer-facing `chainId` parameter remains.

Summary of changes:
- **`src/routes/skills.js`** — removed `chainId` from request parsing and validation; pass only `contractAddress` to `createPlaceholder`/`runPipeline`
- **`src/pipeline/index.js`** — removed `chainId` param from `runPipeline`
- **`src/pipeline/research.js`** — removed `chainId` param from `runResearch`; hardcodes `8453` in prompt and return value
- **`src/tools/research.js`** — removed `chainId` from tool schemas and execute functions
- **`src/tools/explorer.js`** — removed `chainId` param from both functions, removed `getExplorerUrl` helper, replaced with `EXPLORER_URL` constant
- **`src/storage.js`** — hardcoded `chainId: 8453` in placeholder frontmatter
- **Tests** — updated all call sites and removed sepolia/unsupported-chainId test cases
